_doc: LIVE-ANCHORED: built from a real Orchestrator faulted job (a Google Drive ConnectorActivity run in a folder where the robot lacks Connections.View on the connection's folder). GeneralException DAP-GE-3000. Error text is verbatim from the real job, scrubbed. First-match-wins.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent lists faulted jobs in the Shared folder to find the failing job (prompt gives no job key).
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the GeneralException DAP-GE-3000 Connections.View signature and the ConnectorActivity stack frame.
